items.title: Remote Job Market Still Strong Despite Return-To-Office Mandates
items.description: High-profile return-to-office mandates at companies like JPMorgan Chase and Microsoft dominated headlines in 2025, but a new job report shows that remote work continues to play an important role in the modern labor market.
